languages.text: "Я уже объяснял вам: мы никому не отдаем предпочтений. Ваши импланты будут обслужены в порядке очереди, а она формируется исходя из срочности операции. Пока вы ленитесь умаслить голову священными хладагентами, кто-то умирает из-за отсутствия легкого". {n}Вивисектор тяжело выдыхает: судя по темным кругам под глазами, усталость сильно мешает ему сохранять привычное дружелюбие.{/n}

"I have already explained to you: we do not give preferential treatment to anyone. Your implants will be serviced according to your place in the queue, which is in turn based on the urgency of the required procedure. While you're too slothful to coat your own head in sacred coolants, someone else is dying for lack of a lung." {n}The Vivisector exhales heavily: judging by the dark circles under his eyes, fatigue is making it hard for him to maintain his usual cordiality.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Я уже объяснял вам: мы никому не отдаем предпочтений. Ваши импланты будут обслужены в порядке очереди, а она формируется исходя из срочности операции. Пока вы ленитесь умаслить голову священными хладагентами, кто-то умирает из-за отсутствия легкого". {n}Вивисектор тяжело выдыхает: судя по темным кругам под глазами, усталость сильно мешает ему сохранять привычное дружелюбие.{/n}

languages.text: 「もう説明したでしょう。私たちは誰にも特別扱いしません。あなたの義体も順番に整備されます。順番は、必要な処置の緊急度によって決まります。あなたが自分の頭部を聖なる冷却剤で塗るほど怠け者でいる間、他の人たちは肺がないために死んでいます」{n}解剖師は深く息を吐き出す。彼の目の下のクマからわかるように、疲労が彼のいつもの優しさの維持を難しくしている。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have already explained to you: we do not give preferential treatment to anyone. Your implants will be serviced according to your place in the queue, which is in turn based on the urgency of the required procedure. While you're too slothful to coat your own head in sacred coolants, someone else is dying for lack of a lung." {n}The Vivisector exhales heavily: judging by the dark circles under his eyes, fatigue is making it hard for him to maintain his usual cordiality.{/n}

languages.text: "Size daha önce de açıkladım. Kimseye ayrıcalık tanımıyoruz. İmplantlarınız, gerekli prosedürün aciliyetine göre belirlenen sıradaki yerinize göre bakım görecek. Siz kendi kafanızı kutsal soğutucularla kaplayamayacak kadar tembelken bir başkası, akciğer yetmezliğinden ölüyor." {n}Dirikesimci, ağır bir nefes veriyor. Gözlerinin altındaki koyu halkalara bakılırsa yorgunluk, her zamanki samimiyetini korumasını zorlaştırıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have already explained to you: we do not give preferential treatment to anyone. Your implants will be serviced according to your place in the queue, which is in turn based on the urgency of the required procedure. While you're too slothful to coat your own head in sacred coolants, someone else is dying for lack of a lung." {n}The Vivisector exhales heavily: judging by the dark circles under his eyes, fatigue is making it hard for him to maintain his usual cordiality.{/n}

Siz kendi kafanızı kutsal soğutucularla kaplayamayacak kadar tembelken bir başkası, akciğer yetmezliğinden ölüyor." {n}Dirikesimci, ağır bir nefes veriyor. Gözlerinin altındaki koyu halkalara bakılırsa yorgunluk, her zamanki samimiyetini korumasını zorlaştırıyor.{/n}

languages.text: “我已向二位解释过：我们不给予任何人优先权。你们的植入物将按队列顺序接受维护，而队列顺序取决于所需治疗程序的紧急程度。在你们懒于为自己的头颅涂抹神圣冷却剂时，正有人因缺失肺叶而濒临死亡。”{n}解剖者重重呼出一口气。从他眼下的黑影判断，疲劳正使他难以维持一贯的亲和态度。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have already explained to you: we do not give preferential treatment to anyone. Your implants will be serviced according to your place in the queue, which is in turn based on the urgency of the required procedure. While you're too slothful to coat your own head in sacred coolants, someone else is dying for lack of a lung." {n}The Vivisector exhales heavily: judging by the dark circles under his eyes, fatigue is making it hard for him to maintain his usual cordiality.{/n}

languages.text: "Es ist, wie ich Euch bereits erklärt habe: Von uns wird niemand bevorzugt behandelt. Eure Implantate werden basierend auf Eurem Platz in der Schlange gewartet, die wiederum auf der Dringlichkeit der erforderlichen Prozedur basiert. Während Ihr es versäumt habt, Euren Kopf mit heiligen Kühlmitteln zu schützen, stirbt jemand anderes, weil er keine Lunge hat." {n}Der Vivisektor atmet hörbar aus. Angesichts der dunklen Ringen unter seinen Augen ist er offenbar zu müde, um seine sonstige Herzlichkeit zu wahren.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have already explained to you: we do not give preferential treatment to anyone. Your implants will be serviced according to your place in the queue, which is in turn based on the urgency of the required procedure. While you're too slothful to coat your own head in sacred coolants, someone else is dying for lack of a lung." {n}The Vivisector exhales heavily: judging by the dark circles under his eyes, fatigue is making it hard for him to maintain his usual cordiality.{/n}

Angesichts der dunklen Ringen unter seinen Augen ist er offenbar zu müde, um seine sonstige Herzlichkeit zu wahren.{/n}

languages.text: « Je vous l'ai déjà expliqué, ici, personne ne bénéficie d'un traitement de faveur. Vos implants seront examinés en temps voulu, en fonction de votre place dans la file d'attente, qui elle-même dépend de l'urgence de la procédure requise. Vous qui êtes trop paresseux pour vous enduire le crâne de liquides de refroidissement sacrés, sachez que pendant ce temps, d'autres meurent faute de poumon fonctionnel. » {n}Le vivisecteur pousse un soupir las ; à en juger par les cernes sous ses yeux, sa fatigue est telle qu'il lui est difficile de conserver sa bonhomie habituelle.{/n}

languages.text: «Ya se lo he explicado: no damos trato preferente a nadie. Sus implantes serán tratados en función de su lugar en la cola, que a su vez depende de la urgencia del tratamiento necesario. Mientras la pereza le impide cubrir su propia cabeza de refrigerante sagrado, hay quien está muriendo porque le falta un pulmón». {n}El vivisector suspira profundamente. A juzgar por las ojeras, el cansancio está haciendo que le cueste mantener su habitual tono cordial.{/n}
